options.name: default
options.descr: The primary stream that players should select by default if no other preferences are set.

options.name: dub
options.descr: Indicates the stream is a dubbed version of the original language (e.g., translated audio).

options.name: original
options.descr: The original language/version of the content.

options.name: comment
options.descr: A commentary track, typically featuring directors, actors, or producers.

options.name: lyrics
options.descr: Subtitles or text containing song lyrics.

options.name: karaoke
options.descr: Content intended for karaoke use (audio without lead vocals or lyrics with timing).

options.name: forced
options.descr: Subtitles that should be displayed even when the user hasn't explicitly enabled them (e.g., for foreign dialogue in a native movie).

options.name: hearing_impaired
options.descr: Content specialized for the hearing impaired, such as SDH (Subtitles for the Deaf and Hard of Hearing) containing sound effect descriptions.

options.name: visual_impaired
options.descr: An audio description track designed to help visually impaired viewers understand the visual action.

options.name: clean_effects
options.descr: An audio track containing only ambient sounds and music, without dialogue.

options.name: attached_pic
options.descr: A static image attached to the stream, usually album art or a cover image.

options.name: timed_thumbnails
options.descr: Video stream consisting of small images used for seeking previews or chapter markers.

options.name: non_diegetic
options.descr: Audio or subtitles that are not part of the primary narrative world (e.g., technical metadata or external info).

options.name: captions
options.descr: Closed captions or subtitles containing dialogue and relevant sound descriptions.

options.name: descriptions
options.descr: Narrative descriptions of the video content, often for accessibility.

options.name: metadata
options.descr: Data stream containing information about the media rather than playable content.

options.name: dependent
options.descr: A stream that requires another stream to be decoded (e.g., an MVC enhancement layer for 3D video).

options.name: still_image
options.descr: A video stream containing a single frame or static image meant to be displayed continuously.

options.name: multilayer
options.descr: Indicates the stream contains multiple layers of content (e.g., HDR10+ or Dolby Vision layers).
